title: Frequently Asked Questions
enterprise: Need higher limits or custom features?
enterpriseDescription: Contact our team for enterprise solutions, volume discounts, or custom analysis requirements.

questions.question: What if I exceed my analysis limit?
questions.answer: There is no limit on analyses for Pro users. Free users can upgrade anytime to access more analyses.

questions.question: Can I cancel anytime?
questions.answer: Yes, cancel your subscription anytime with no hidden fees. You'll keep access until the end of your billing period.

questions.question: Do you offer discounts?
questions.answer: Yes! Annual subscriptions get 20% off. We also offer enterprise plans for organizations.

questions.question: How long do I have access to reports?
questions.answer: All your analysis reports are stored indefinitely. You can download and reference them anytime.
